data.body: Pushed to Gerrit as change 792 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/792). Extracted the provider/model-resolution + Anthropic-construction cluster into new leaf src/rebar/llm/anthropic_model.py (171 LOC); runner.py 849->710 LOC. Graduated runner.py off the gate (removed from allowlist + ceilings, deleted arch.md offenders row). Re-exported the 5 externally-referenced names; run() keeps bare-name calls (monkeypatch seam intact); dropped now-unused 'import os'. make lint clean; 112 tests pass (module-size contract + transport_retry + llm_timeouts + runner_local_proxy_bypass + pydantic_ai_runner + execution_mode_dispatch + llm_framework). Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 before submit/close.
